channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: From Taboo to Test: Could Menstrual Blood Aid Diagnosis?
item.description: New research indicates menstrual blood may offer diagnostic and biological insights, with potential uses in cancer screening.

item.title: Romania Remains Europe's Measles Hotspot
item.description: Romania's children under 5 are hit hardest by Europe's measles outbreaks. Are new policies boosting childhood vaccination rates?

item.title: Study Shows Dangerous Links Between Drug, Alcohol Use and Adolescent Mental Health
item.description: Adolescents who use drugs or binge drink are more likely to face psychological distress and have suicidal thoughts or attempts.

item.title: Why Insulin, Core Diabetes Treatment, Remains Inaccessible for Millions
item.description: Insulin's discovery in 1921 transformed diabetes care, turning type 1 diabetes from a death sentence into a manageable condition.
